title: Green Bean Casserole
description: Tender green beans baked in creamy mushroom sauce with a savory Parmesan topping. A holiday classic.

steps.instruction: Cook green beans in boiling salted water for 12–15 minutes until completely tender — much longer than usual. They should bend easily without snapping.
Drain beans. Cut into pieces approximately 12–15 mm long.
In a bowl, mix cream of mushroom soup, milk, garlic powder, and onion powder until smooth.
Combine cut green beans with the soup mixture. Stir well to coat all pieces.
Pour into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish. Sprinkle Parmesan on top if using.
Bake for 20 minutes until heated through and bubbling. Do not allow a crust to form on top.
Remove from oven. Stir before serving to redistribute sauce and confirm all beans are moist.

notes: Make sure to remove all string fibers from the green beans before cooking. The cream of mushroom soup provides a perfectly smooth binding sauce.
